# UC-001 Test Fixture — Minimal Use Case Source Document

**Use Case ID:** UC-001
**Status:** Draft
**Version:** 1.0

## Purpose

Minimal fixture for integration tests. Provides >=2 requirement statements that
tests can use as canonical REQ-IDs without touching real project files.

## Functional Requirements

FR-001: The system shall accept a use case identifier and produce a structured SRS document.
FR-002: The system shall validate the use case identifier format before processing.

## Non-Functional Requirements

NFR-001: The system shall complete SRS generation within 30 seconds on standard hardware.

## Notes

This file is a test fixture only. It is not part of the production source document set.
Do not cite this file in production trace records.
